arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta challenges Arsenal to be more ruthless on European road trips
arts.sum: Arsenal have won one in eight continental away games Arteta’s side face second-placed Sporting in Lisbon Mikel Arteta has challenged his Arsenal team to fix their patchy European away form against a vibrant Sporting on Tuesday night, admitting they need to improve a record of just one win in their past eight continental trips. The visit to Sporting, who have made a flying start to the new-look Champions League and sit second in the table, may have a significant bearing on Arsenal’s hopes of avoiding a playoff for the last 16 in February. They have drawn blanks in all of their past four Champions League away games and, even if they arguably deserved more at Inter last time out, Arteta knows it is a record that cannot hold. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye 'top striker' who can be Amorim's new Gyokeres
arts.sum: When fit, Boniface is one of the best strikers in the Bundesliga and perhaps one of the most unique players in Europe. Man Utd eye 'top striker' who can be Amorim's new Gyokeres

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides telling response to Viktor Gyokeres question ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Arsenal will be aiming to keep Sporting Lisbon star Viktor Gyokeres in their Champions League clash with the Portuguese side but Mikel Arteta has refused to talk up his abilities

arts.ttl: Raya warns Arsenal of 'in-form' Gyökeres' threat
arts.sum: David Raya has warned his Arsenal teammates that Sporting CP forward Viktor Gyökeres is a "top player in form" as Mikel Arteta urged his strikers to find their ruthless streak to keep their Champions League hopes on track.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urges Arsenal to ‘make a statement’ at Sporting
arts.sum: A narrow 1-0 defeat at Inter Milan last time out has left Arteta’s side down in 12th place in the new-look Champions League table.

arts.ttl: Team News: Sporting Lisbon vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Sporting Lisbon and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen go head-to-head with Arsenal and Tottenham for talented wonderkid
arts.sum: According to Patrick Berger, Bayer Leverkusen, alongside a number of other Bundesliga sides, are looking to go head-to-head with Arsenal and Tottenham for the talented wonderkid Bazoumana Touré. It is…

arts.ttl: Everything spotted in Arsenal training for Sporting CP amid Rice return hope
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta very nearly had the full complement of his Arsenal squad out for training at London Colney on Monday before the Champions League clash against Sporting CP. Martin Odegaard, Bukayo Saka and Riccardo Calafiori have all returned to action ahead of the busy festive period with Declan Rice on the bench for the clash against Nottingham Forest after pulling out of England duty for Nations League fixtures over the November international break.

arts.ttl: Arsenal must evolve with Saka to avoid Liverpool call after Salah admission
arts.sum: Saka is Arsenal through and through, and signed a new contract in north London last summer. I think I have everything I need to become the best player I can be, and that’s why I’m happy to stay here and be here for the future, because I really believe that we can achieve big things."

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal to assess 14-year-old wonderkid in first-team friendly
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri set the club record for being their youngest Premier League player last season, when he played Brentford aged 15 years and 181 days. The match will prominently feature Dowman alongside fellow academy stars Ethan Nwaneri and Miles Lewis-Skelly, mixed with first-team players.
